identity.name: The Modern Miller
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Heritage Bakery with Clinical Precision.
Content is King: The Nutrition Label is the hero—treat it like a legal document.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to signal luxury.
Contrast: Deep Brown text on Off-White backgrounds for maximum readability.

buttons.default: rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#5D4037] text-[#5D4037] hover:bg-[#5D4037] hover:text-white bg-transparent

inputs.default: rounded-md border-[#D7CCC8] bg-white px-4 py-3 text-[#5D4037] placeholder:text-[#A1887F] focus:border-[#5D4037] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#5D4037] transition-all

cards.default: rounded-xl border border-[#D7CCC8]/50 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow p-6
cards.float: rounded-xl border-none bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md shadow-xl p-8

nutrition_label.container: border-2 border-black bg-white p-4 font-sans text-black max-w-md mx-auto print:border-2 print:border-black
nutrition_label.title: font-black text-3xl leading-none
nutrition_label.row_bold: flex justify-between border-b-4 border-black py-1 font-bold

images.description: Golden wheat field - use with overlay for landing page bg
Powdered texture - use for subtle section backgrounds
Spoons with grains - use for ingredients/supplements section

assets.icons: Use lucide-react (Wheat, Leaf, Scale, Calculator, FileText, User, Settings, LogOut)

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Theme: Force LIGHT mode in tailwind config. Dark mode is not for this brand.
3. Frontend: Implement the 'Customer Lookup' as the index page. Use the wheat field image as a full-screen background with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/40) so the white card pops.
4. Nutrition Label: This MUST be a separate component. Use standard FSSAI formatting (Energy, Protein, Carbs, Sugar, Fat). Make it look like a physical sticker.
5. Admin: Create a 'DashboardLayout' with a sidebar. Use the 'ingredients' image as a subtle header background in the admin area.
6. Print: Add '@media print' styles to the Nutrition Label component so it prints cleanly on a 4x6 or A4 sheet (hide buttons/nav).
7. Data: Mock the backend calls for now, but structure the data exactly as the nutrition label needs it.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Use 'Inter' for UI text and 'Playfair Display' for Headings.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility (WCAG AA).
